name: Mrs Fields' Lemon Chocolate Chip Buttons
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, soda, and coriander with a wire whisk. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, cream butter and sugar with an electric mixer at medium speed until forming a grainy paste.
4. Add eggs and lemon extract, and beat well.
5. Scrape down the sides of the bowl.
6. Gradually add the flour mixture and chocolate chips, blending at low speed just until combined.
7. Drop dough by teaspoons onto ungreased baking sheets, 1 1/2 inches apart.
8. Bake for 14-15 minutes on the center rack of the oven. Do not brown.
9. Immediately transfer the cookies to a cool surface with a spatula.
